chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 4912 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 07.10.2025 Mr. Shoukat Ali Shehroz, advocate for the petitioners. Ms. Zahrah Sehr Vayani, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Naeem Akhtar, Additional Advocate General Sindh. Per learned counsel, grievance of petitioners has been addressed, therefore, does not press this petition, which is dismissed as withdrawn. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
